title: Dense Croatian Asparagus Paella
description: This festive dish features asparagus in a rich, ovo-vegetarian-friendly paella. Perfect for a special occasion or holiday meal.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium heat.
Add 1 large onion, diced, and cook until translucent.
Add 2 cloves of garlic, minced, and cook for 1 minute more.
Add 1 pound of asparagus, trimmed, and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add 1 cup of long grain rice and stir to coat with oil and mix with vegetables.
Add 2 cups of vegetable broth, 1 cup of water, and 1 teaspoon of smoked paprika, and bring to a simmer.
Cook, uncovered, until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in 1/4 cup of grated Parmesan cheese and 1 tablespoon of chopped fresh parsley.
